Shard of Hsagra's Talisman  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE
Shard of Hsagra's Talisman
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE

Item Lore:This is a large part of the Talisman
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Agamenoar
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 01:45:02
Page Updated:Sun Jul 2nd, 2023

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
Derakor the Vindicator
King Tormax
The Fabled King Tormax
The Statue of Rallos Zek

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Velketor the Sorcerer

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Dragon Necropolis
Quest Name
Key to Sleeper's Tomb

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel
Velketor's Labyrinth
This item can be turned in to Jaled Dar`s shade in Dragon Necropolis for a Key to Sleeper's Tomb.


Uploaded January 13th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction

# Aug 22 2004 at 8:11 AM Rating: Decent

Killed AOW Last Night It Dropped The Shard of Hsagra's Talisman .Now Im One Step Closer TO ST The Only Suck Is That I Want My Friends To Come To. LoL Oh well Ill Just Have To Send Them A Post Card ..................8/21/04

QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2006 at 10:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1658103433487
View User Forum
11 posts
Dropped tonight off Fabled Statue in Kael, finally got my Sleeper's Key, now for the factioning. LOL
▲ Page top
RE: WOO HOO ...........
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2008 at 1:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591923873379
Scholar
319 posts
What factioning? Unless you killed Jaled Dar's Shade a bijillion times, and you were kos to him, there is no factioning required. (And as far as I know, no one kills Jaled Dar's Shade, as there is no loot.) Just do the turn in get your key. Many of the mobs in Sleepers Tomb have faction associated with them, but it is a raid zone, you are supposed to wreck those factions anyway. You start out KOS there, and only get more so. You might hurt your Tormax or Rif/Zek factions in ST, but go kill dragons in Sky Shrine if you are a giant hugger to make up for it. But no factioning required to get the key, zone in, or kill. A few of the drops there require Claws of Veeshan facion in SS, but hardly worthwhile doing even in 2004. If you look at the quest rewards for the turn ins in SS, you will wonder if anyone ever did the quests.
▲ Page top
